queries.question: What is the offer for the HR position?
queries.sql: select min_pay, max_pay from Base_Pay_Range JOIN Job_Post on Job_Post.base_pay_id = Base_Pay_Range.id WHERE title LIKE '%HR%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?min_pay ?max_pay WHERE {
  ?base_pay_range a :Base_Pay_Range .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasBase_Pay_Range ?base_pay_range .
  ?base_pay_range p:min_pay ?min_pay .
  ?base_pay_range p:max_pay ?max_pay .
  ?job_post p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*HR.*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: What is the offer for the HR position?
queries.sql: select health_insurance, dental_insurance, vision_insurance from Benefits JOIN Job_Post on Job_Post.benefit_package_id = Benefits.id WHERE title LIKE '%HR%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?health_insurance ?dental_insurance ?vision_insurance WHERE {
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?benefits p:health_insurance ?health_insurance .
  ?benefits p:dental_insurance ?dental_insurance .
  ?benefits p:vision_insurance ?vision_insurance .
  ?job_post p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*HR.*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: What is the offer for the HR position?
queries.sql: select min_pay, max_pay, health_insurance, dental_insurance, vision_insurance  from Base_Pay_Range JOIN Job_Post on Job_Post.base_pay_id = Base_Pay_Range.id JOIN Benefits on Job_Post.benefit_package_id = Benefits.id  WHERE title LIKE '%HR%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?min_pay ?max_pay ?health_insurance ?dental_insurance ?vision_insurance WHERE {
  ?base_pay_range a :Base_Pay_Range .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasBase_Pay_Range ?base_pay_range .
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?job_post p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?base_pay_range p:min_pay ?min_pay .
  ?base_pay_range p:max_pay ?max_pay .
  ?benefits p:health_insurance ?health_insurance .
  ?benefits p:dental_insurance ?dental_insurance .
  ?benefits p:vision_insurance ?vision_insurance .
  ?job_post p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*HR.*$", "i"))
}

queries.question: What is the base pay range for a job?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?min_pay ?max_pay WHERE {
  ?base_pay_range a :Base_Pay_Range .
  ?base_pay_range p:min_pay ?min_pay .
  ?base_pay_range p:max_pay ?max_pay .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the offer for a job?
What is the offer for the HR position?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?min_pay ?max_pay ?health_insurance ?dental_insurance ?vision_insurance WHERE {
  ?base_pay_range a :Base_Pay_Range .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasBase_Pay_Range ?base_pay_range .
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?job_post p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?base_pay_range p:min_pay ?min_pay .
  ?base_pay_range p:max_pay ?max_pay .
  ?benefits p:health_insurance ?health_insurance .
  ?benefits p:dental_insurance ?dental_insurance .
  ?benefits p:vision_insurance ?vision_insurance .
  ?job_post p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*HR.*$", "i"))
} }
  component: { SELECT ?min_pay ?max_pay WHERE {
  ?base_pay_range a :Base_Pay_Range .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasBase_Pay_Range ?base_pay_range .
  ?base_pay_range p:min_pay ?min_pay .
  ?base_pay_range p:max_pay ?max_pay .
  ?job_post p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*HR.*$", "i"))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?health_insurance ?dental_insurance ?vision_insurance WHERE {
  ?benefits a :Benefits .
  ?job_post a :JobPostings .
  ?job_post p:hasBenefits ?benefits .
  ?benefits p:health_insurance ?health_insurance .
  ?benefits p:dental_insurance ?dental_insurance .
  ?benefits p:vision_insurance ?vision_insurance .
  ?job_post p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*HR.*$", "i"))
} }
}
